'''鈭歫-zh-d''' ('''kajazhad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrovaccinate|electrovaccinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrovaccinate|electrovaccinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-zh-d
|-
! Lemma
| kajazhad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijazhad|thijazhad]] || [[word:jijazhad|jijazhad]] || [[word:shijazhad|shijazhad]] || [[word:kijazhad|kijazhad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujazhad|thuthujazhad]] || [[word:jujujazhad|jujujazhad]] || [[word:shushujazhad|shushujazhad]] || [[word:kukujazhad|kukujazhad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujazhad|thujazhad]] || [[word:jujazhad|jujazhad]] || [[word:shujazhad|shujazhad]] || [[word:kujazhad|kujazhad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujazhad|thujazhad]] || [[word:jujazhad|jujazhad]] || [[word:shujazhad|shujazhad]] || [[word:kujazhad|kujazhad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejazhad|thejazhad]] || [[word:jejazhad|jejazhad]] || [[word:shejazhad|shejazhad]] || [[word:kejazhad|kejazhad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojazhad|thothojazhad]] || [[word:jojojazhad|jojojazhad]] || [[word:shoshojazhad|shoshojazhad]] || [[word:kokojazhad|kokojazhad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojazhad|thojazhad]] || [[word:jojazhad|jojazhad]] || [[word:shojazhad|shojazhad]] || [[word:kojazhad|kojazhad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojazhad|thojazhad]] || [[word:jojazhad|jojazhad]] || [[word:shojazhad|shojazhad]] || [[word:kojazhad|kojazhad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]] || [[word:jazhad|jazhad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jazhad|th忙jazhad]] || [[word:j忙jazhad|j忙jazhad]] || [[word:sh忙jazhad|sh忙jazhad]] || [[word:k忙jazhad|k忙jazhad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajazhad|thathajazhad]] || [[word:jajajazhad|jajajazhad]] || [[word:shashajazhad|shashajazhad]] || [[word:kakajazhad|kakajazhad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajazhad|thajazhad]] || [[word:jajazhad|jajazhad]] || [[word:shajazhad|shajazhad]] || [[word:kajazhad|kajazhad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajazhad|thajazhad]] || [[word:jajazhad|jajazhad]] || [[word:shajazhad|shajazhad]] || [[word:kajazhad|kajazhad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajazhad|shajazhad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajazhad|goshajazhad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajazhad|gokishajazhad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajazhadn眉|shajazhadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkn眉|goshajazhadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhadn眉|gokishajazhadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajazhadsh毛|shajazhadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajazhadnksh毛|goshajazhadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajazhadsh毛|gokishajazhadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhadro|shajazhadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkro|goshajazhadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhadro|gokishajazhadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhadmu|shajazhadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkmu|goshajazhadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhadmu|gokishajazhadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajazhadsher|shajazhadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajazhadnksher|goshajazhadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajazhadsher|gokishajazhadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajazhadng|shajazhadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkng|goshajazhadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajazhadng|gokishajazhadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajazhadya|shajazhadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkya|goshajazhadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajazhadya|gokishajazhadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajazhadyam|shajazhadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkyam|goshajazhadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajazhadyam|gokishajazhadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhadn眉sh毛|shajazhadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkn眉sh毛|goshajazhadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhadn眉sh毛|gokishajazhadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhadn眉ro|shajazhadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkn眉ro|goshajazhadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhadn眉ro|gokishajazhadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhadn眉mu|shajazhadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkn眉mu|goshajazhadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhadn眉mu|gokishajazhadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhadsh毛n眉|shajazhadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhadnksh毛n眉|goshajazhadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhadsh毛n眉|gokishajazhadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhadsh毛ro|shajazhadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhadnksh毛ro|goshajazhadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhadsh毛ro|gokishajazhadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhadsh毛mu|shajazhadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhadnksh毛mu|goshajazhadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhadsh毛mu|gokishajazhadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhadron眉|shajazhadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkron眉|goshajazhadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhadron眉|gokishajazhadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhadrosh毛|shajazhadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkrosh毛|goshajazhadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhadrosh毛|gokishajazhadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhadromu|shajazhadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkromu|goshajazhadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhadromu|gokishajazhadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhadmun眉|shajazhadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkmun眉|goshajazhadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhadmun眉|gokishajazhadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhadmush毛|shajazhadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkmush毛|goshajazhadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhadmush毛|gokishajazhadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhadmuro|shajazhadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhadnkmuro|goshajazhadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhadmuro|gokishajazhadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
